{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194834A048190E8C16823398EB"}"},"total":2303},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578729882872480537","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的是真的不错，看了十多年小说了，好的也看过坏的也看了，这书真是不错，有看下去的欲望，人物写的很鲜明，剧情很缜密。题材也很新颖。真心推荐。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764562947,"group_id":"7379965495153282072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"平平无奇，不定时更新，就是这样。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1FZzRW+WimSfFYLyzAGznF7guDK/T+MYhcFxSEAcZ/Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/533982ed0af44262807e46ef9b6d115a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790903&x-signature=dxT%2FDCyds8j2%2BfWhz%2BKsGZyKgMg%3D","user_id":"3866300065000056","user_name":"从九点开始"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3866300065000056","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379965495153282072","book_info":{"abstract":"祁肖一觉醒来，进入列车求生世界。
列车每天八点停靠随机车站，可以选择下车探索，也能留在车上等待发车。
这里有无尽的宝藏，也有未知的危险。
探索车站，收集物资，升级列车，好好活下去。
祁肖的新人礼包，没有和他人一样开出食物，反而开出一张模块卡，激活了特殊模块——车站预告。
每次列车启动时，会更新即将停靠车站的详细信息，告知其中的危险以及宝物。
在其他人都要小心翼翼探索时，祁肖则依靠车站预告，快速发育。
【本次停靠车站：阳光健身房，该站是大型健身房，无危险。】
【本次停靠车站：蔡家村，该站有丧尸鸡，危险等级：2级。村子中央的村长家，有一级宝箱一个。】  
【本次停靠车站：三山站，该站有大型超市一家，无危险。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6af4cd770549eefcbeebc959722ab890","author":"葡萄味酸奶","author_id":"","book_id":"7379965495153282072","book_name":"列车求生：我知晓下一站信息","book_short_name":"我不是列车王","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7394843731574129176","read_count":"78298","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1160455"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"480","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,诸天万界,求生,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/047914915a793100d343b8f6d55a5993~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450514&x-signature=SUdURsdwKayWfv7tKI909F9HbG4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3769602562857911","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"472"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194834A048190E8C16823398EB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_c 整体感官非常好，虽然我个人喜欢看后宫文，但也不强求，相处方式目前看来都非常自然，我喜欢看水到渠成的感情文，强扭的瓜不甜，
